name: Bordeaux Finish Access and TBM Transport Watch
summary: Monitor official Bordeaux/TBM notices for Stage 7 finish access, since no Tour-specific TBM disruption page was found yet.
whyItMatters: The itinerary watches the Stage 7 Bordeaux finish, and the official Tour timetable shows the route entering the city via Pont Simone Veil before the finish.
pros: Official Tour stage page confirms the Bordeaux approach and finish timing
TBM is the official public transport operator for Bordeaux Metropole
Place des Quinconces Fan Park gives a central official fallback gathering point
cons: No official Bordeaux/TBM Tour-specific road or transit notice was found during this pass
Exact finish line, barriers, parking, and pedestrian access need city/metropole publication
Central tram/bus service may be heavily altered around finish time

logistics.opening_hours: Website/resource watch; recheck close to July 10
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Relevant to Bordeaux finish and Place des Quinconces Fan Park
logistics.transit: Use TBM official site/app and any special-event notices once published
logistics.parking: Unknown; avoid assuming central Bordeaux vehicle access on race day
logistics.road_closure_notes: Official Stage 7 timetable lists Pont Simone Veil 17:07 / 17:18 / 17:29, Bordeaux entry 17:08 / 17:18 / 17:30, and finish 17:13 / 17:24 / 17:35.

timing.best_visit_window: Recheck official Bordeaux and TBM sources daily during race week, then morning of Fri Jul 10

sources.title: Tour de France Stage 7 - Hagetmau > Bordeaux
sources.note: Official ASO stage page with Bordeaux approach and finish timing.

sources.title: TBM - Bordeaux public transport official website
sources.note: Official Bordeaux Metropole public transport site to monitor for Tour-related service notices.

sources.title: City of Bordeaux official website
sources.note: Official city site to monitor for municipal road closures, parking restrictions, and spectator information.

sources.title: Tour de France - Fan Parks and Les Ateliers du Tour
sources.note: Official ASO page confirming the Bordeaux Fan Park at Place des Quinconces on July 9-10.

open_questions: Has Bordeaux or Bordeaux Metropole published a Tour de France 2026 circulation/parking order?
Will TBM alter tram service at Quinconces, Place de la Bourse, or stations near the finish?
Where exactly should spectators stand for the finish versus the Fan Park?
